rulings.Case Title: EUGENIA LOPEZ et al VS. U.S. BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 20, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs U.S. BANK, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC., RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A., and MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overrule as to first cause of action. Sustain with leave to amend as to second through fourth causes of action. Second cause of action should allege payments. Third and fourth causes of action lacks specificity and no documents were attached and needs to address why documents not read and how there is a fiduciary duty. = (501/REQ)

DEFENDANT ANDY LI's Motion To Set Aside Order Compelling Response To Plaintiff's Request For Document Prodiction Set 1. Deny set aside and compelling re discovery. rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 20, 2012, line DEFENDANT CAMILLE DUNCAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Off calendar, default entered. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAREN GRIGGI VS. SCOTT MORROW et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 20, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT SCOTT MORROW's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend in good faith as to first cause of action, illegal sublet and as to second cause of actionl only the removal of the camera as nuisance and should amend to reconcile notice re answer and paragraph seven of the complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAREN GRIGGI VS. SCOTT MORROW et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 20, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT SCOTT MORROW's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Grant motion to strike. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAREN GRIGGI VS. RAFAEL SEGURA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 20, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT RAFAEL SEGURA's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Overrule, first cause of action re landlord tenant relationship. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAREN GRIGGI VS. RAFAEL SEGURA et al

rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 20, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT RAFAEL SEGURA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to clarify uncertainty as when the operative notice was served on defendant. = (501/REQ)
